bench
Enlarge Image

Bench – Free Standing 36" to 96" Wide

Model # BENCH-36-L

Lead time: usually ships within 1–2 weeks

From $225.00
36"
Light
9.5"

Pair with lockers for a complete installation. View lockers.

Size (36" W example): 36" W × 18" H × 9.5" D

Weight: approx. 20 lbs (36" width)

Volume Discounts

QuantityPrice
1$225.00
2 – 5$190.00
6+$180.00
BulkContact us for pricing

Bench – Features & Options

Features

  • Constructed of solid butcher block wood
  • Ideal for industrial, office, or recreational locker room facilities
  • Classic look with strength and durability
  • Available in light or dark finish
  • Widths from 36" to 96" in 1-foot increments; easy to assemble
  • 18" high; 9.5" or 14" deep
  • Wood seating area 1¼" thick
  • Free-standing benches include black powder-coated pedestals (2 for 36"–72" wide, 3 for 84" and 96")
  • Delivered unassembled – minor assembly required

Options

  • Widths: 36", 48", 60", 72", 84", 96"
  • Depth: 9.5" or 14"
  • Light or dark finish
  • Pair with our wood lockers for a complete locker room

Downloads

  • Request spec sheet & quote
  • Installation support
  • View all lockers

PlayerStall

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks (Stadium & Elite) or custom wood, phenolic & more in 8–12 weeks. Price match guarantee. 30+ years experience.
